description_long: This is a modern, generously sized sofa with a light beige fabric upholstery, featuring a symmetrical design and plush, overstuffed cushions. The sofa has two large seat cushions and three back cushions, with two additional side cushions for extra comfort and support. The armrests are wide, gently sloped, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's silhouette. The backrest is continuous and slightly angled, providing ergonomic support without any visible tufting or decorative stitching. The base of the sofa is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The overall look is clean, inviting, and suitable for both residential and public urban environments.
description: A large, modern beige sofa with plush cushions, wide padded armrests, and a seamless, boxy base. Its clean, symmetrical design and soft upholstery make it inviting and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and two side cushions, highlighting its symmetrical and plush design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of the cushions, emphasizing the sofa's substantial padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, smooth backrest and the solid, uninterrupted base, with no visible legs or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest profile, cushion depth, and the sofa's overall boxy structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions, three back cushions, and two side cushions; all cushions appear loose and uniform in size, arranged symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests that are gently sloped and integrated into the sofa's silhouette, matching the height of the backrest with a soft, seamless profile.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a solid, boxy plinth that extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a grounded, legless design.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a slight angle, smooth surface, and no visible tufting or segmentation; features three loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte fabric texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
